description:
Dr. Giovanni has become an Infernal and taken over Yu`s body. He inserts the key into Amaterasu`s power generator and triggers the Great Cataclysm. When he does, the world and the images of Adolla begin to merge into one, and large-scale fires break out all over the Empire. As cries of despair rise from the people, the Special Fire Force soldiers are powerless with no course of action left.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Those Who Fight Back / The Final Imagining
抗う者たち / 終末想像[イメージ]
